caption: A woman with dark skin is shown in a close-up shot against a neutral, blurry beige background. She is wearing a dark blue garment and small gold stud earrings. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, looking toward the camera. Her facial expression is sorrowful; her eyes are moist with tears, and her mouth is slightly downturned in a grimace of distress. As the scene progresses, she briefly closes her eyes and tilts her head slightly, her expression deepening with emotion before she opens her eyes again. The white text "My name is Consolata," is superimposed at the bottom of the screen across all frames. There are no other people, objects, or logos visible in the shot.
